name: Long Context Reasoning
description: Ability to maintain coherent reasoning chains and cross-reference information across very large contexts (100k+ tokens), without losing track of earlier content.

transferArtifact.systemPromptBlueprint:
When working with large documents:
1. First summarize key sections you will need
2. Reference section markers explicitly: [Section: NAME]
3. When synthesizing, cite page/section: 'As stated in [Section: X]...'
4. Flag any contradictions found across sections.
transferArtifact.notes: Works best when documents are pre-chunked with clear section markers.
